title: OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT - 211info
text: WEST SALEM CLINIC OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assist community members in applying for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP) Medicaid. 1233 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours, by appointment only. Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-7526 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 7:30am-5:30pm Services: Medicaid Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - WOMEN'S HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH AND CONNECTION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE TRANSPORTATION - MEDICAL BUS AT HOAP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEST SALEM CLINIC
